CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Birthday__c ) || TEXT(Birthday__c) ="1900-01-01", "", IF(OR(MONTH(today())-MONTH( Birthday__c )>0, AND(MONTH(TODAY()) - MONTH(Birthday__c)>=0, DAY(TODAY()) - DAY(Birthday__c)>=0)), IF((MFLOOR((YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Birthday__c))/10)*10)<80,TEXT(MFLOOR((YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Birthday__c))/10)*10) & "代","80代以上"), IF((MFLOOR((YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Birthday__c)-1)/10)*10)<80,TEXT(MFLOOR((YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Birthday__c)-1)/10)*10) & "代","80代以上")))
CustomField.label: 年代
